_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: AI/ML Engineer
experiences.description: Leading AI/ML initiatives for PayPal's global fraud detection and personalization platforms, processing $1.5T+ in annual payment volume across 430M+ active accounts.
responsibilities: Architected and deployed a real-time fraud detection model on AWS SageMaker using XGBoost + LSTM ensemble, achieving 94.7% precision and reducing fraudulent transaction losses by $18.3M annually within 6 months of launch

Reduced ML model deployment cycle from 3 weeks to 4 days by engineering a fully automated CI/CD MLOps pipeline using AWS CodePipeline, SageMaker Pipelines, Docker, and Kubernetes — a 78% efficiency gain adopted org-wide

Built a distributed feature store on AWS S3 + DynamoDB serving 200+ real-time features with <10ms p99 latency, replacing a legacy batch pipeline and enabling 35% improvement in model freshness across 7 production models

Led end-to-end development of a transaction anomaly detection microservice using AWS Lambda + Kinesis Streams, processing 2.4M events/hour at 99.98% uptime — eliminated $2.1M/year in manual review costs

Drove adoption of generative AI (AWS Bedrock / Claude API) for intelligent dispute summarization, cutting agent handle time by 22% and improving CSAT scores by 14 points across PayPal's customer operations team

Implemented SageMaker Model Monitor with custom drift-detection logic, proactively catching 3 major data distribution shifts before they degraded live models — preserving $4.2M in at-risk revenue during a critical Q4 period

Mentored 4 junior ML engineers, established team MLOps best practices, and represented the team in PayPal's internal AI Center of Excellence — contributing 3 reusable ML modules now used across 5 product squads

experiences.title: Machine Learning Engineer (Associate)
experiences.description: Delivered AI/ML and cloud solutions for Fortune 500 clients across BFSI and e-commerce verticals, working within Accenture's Applied Intelligence practice.
responsibilities: Developed a customer churn prediction model (Random Forest + SHAP explainability) for a major Indian bank, enabling targeted retention campaigns that reduced churn rate by 19% and saved the client ₹42 Cr ($5M) in Year 1

Designed and deployed an end-to-end NLP document classification pipeline using BERT fine-tuned on AWS SageMaker, processing 50,000+ legal documents/day with 91% accuracy — eliminating 6 FTEs worth of manual review

Built AWS-based data ingestion and preprocessing infrastructure (S3, Glue, Lambda) for a retail analytics project, cutting ETL processing time from 14 hours to 38 minutes (95% reduction) for a 500GB nightly data load

Engineered a recommendation engine (collaborative filtering + deep learning embeddings) for an e-commerce client's 8M product catalog, increasing click-through rate by 27% and contributing to a 9% lift in quarterly GMV
Implemented MLflow model tracking and versioning across 3 concurrent project teams, standardizing experiment management and reducing model reproducibility issues by 100% over a 4-month engagement

Contributed to a computer vision quality-control system (YOLOv5 on AWS Rekognition) for a manufacturing client, achieving 97.3% defect detection accuracy and reducing product recall costs by $800K annually
